title: Isolate
description: Isolation. A mod that adds a new dimension, a few blocks, and items.
body:
**A simple mod adding a new dimension (mainly for lore/isolation,) some new blocks, and 2 new items.**

# The Items.
**Charm of Isolation.** Right click to transport oneself to Isolation. Off-hand + Right Click to return to overworld. Attack another player with this item to send them there.

**Tainted Knife.** Returns the target player to the overworld if stabbed in Isolation. 9 attack damage, 1.6 attack speed. Used only for lore.

# The Blocks.
**Pillar** (+ Horizontal Variants.) (+ Isolated variant.)

**Package** (Mainly deco, but neat anyway.)

# The Dimension.
**Isolation.** An empty black & white space, completely quiet and freezing. Water is black and will freeze. Foliage + Grass are white. 

# Recipes.
The blocks are stonecutter recipes. To get pillars, you must put a Quartz Pillar in the stonecutter. To get the Package (3), you must put a piece of Stripped Oak Wood in the stonecutter.

**Side note, this mod is intended as BCSMP lore, and as such, is not entirely balanced for this reason.**

### silly extra side note

Knife tooltip:

*"Stained by divine blood. Pierces the target, returning them to the Overworld."*
